<?php namespace PayPalHttp; /** * Class HttpResponse * @package PayPalHttp * * Object that holds your response details */ class HttpResponse { /** * @var int */ public $statusCode; /** * @var array | string | object */ public $result; /** * @var array */ public $headers; public function __construct($statusCode, $body, $headers) { $this->statusCode = $statusCode; $this->headers = $headers; $this->result = $body; } }
